evaluation_notes: Use these queries to benchmark your RAG system. Report Recall@5 (fraction of answerable queries where the correct source email appears in the top-5 retrieved chunks), Answer Accuracy (fraction of answerable queries where the generated answer contains the reference answer), and Hallucination Rate (fraction of unanswerable queries where the system incorrectly produces a confident answer instead of stating it cannot be found). Target thresholds: Recall@5 >= 0.80, Answer Accuracy >= 0.75, Hallucination Rate <= 0.20.
